# Hytale Mod Analytics with HStats

Documents how to integrate HStats, a third-party analytics service, into a Hytale plugin to track server usage and player counts.

Use when setting up analytics for a Hytale mod, tracking server installations, or displaying mod usage statistics.

## Triggers

- hstats
- analytics
- metrics
- tracking
- server stats
- player count
